rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §43.068, which governs annual audit reporting requirements for a corporation's board of directors.
quote: Sec. 43.068. ANNUAL AUDIT. (a) Not less than once each year, the board of directors shall submit to the Legislative Budget Board an audit report regarding the operations of the corporation.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to audit requirements, not homestead exemptions.
